query:
SELECT 'partner' as type, partner_id as id, name FROM peppr_partners WHERE name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Vitest%' OR name LIKE '%test%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'property' as type, property_id as id, name FROM peppr_properties WHERE name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Vitest%' OR name LIKE '%test%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'user' as type, user_id as id, email FROM peppr_users WHERE email LIKE '%test%vitest%' OR email LIKE '%vitest%'
